title: Indulgent Thai Mars Bar Bars
description: A light, floral-flavored Thai-inspired treat using Mars bars for a sweet, indulgent bite with reduced sugar and diabetic-friendly adjustments.

ingredients.name: mars bar (chopped)
ingredients.notes: Use low-sugar variant for diabetic-friendly option
Floral note from fresh jasmine tea leaves (optional)

ingredients.name: honey
ingredients.notes: Natural sweetener for low glycemic impact

ingredients.name: vanilla extract
ingredients.notes: Adds subtle floral aroma without sugar

instructions: Chop 100g Mars bars into small pieces.
Heat 200ml coconut milk in a saucepan over medium heat until warm (not boiling).
Add 15ml jasmine tea leaves (if using) and 10g honey to the warm coconut milk. Stir gently until combined.
Fold in 5ml vanilla extract and mix well.
Add Mars bar pieces to the mixture and stir until evenly coated.
Pour mixture into a chilled glass dish and chill for 20 minutes to set.
